creator: decke@bluelife.at
text:
Sorry, but this patch is useless because it ignores
emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod and
emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions. In addition to that the work to
bring vbox to 4.2.12
has already been done and can be found in the redports repository:

http://redports.org/browser/virtualbox

The IPv6 patch in the referenced PR is okay so I will close this one.

--
Bernhard Fr=F6hlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
